This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] scrollParent skips intermediate closed shadow tree nodes
  closedInnerElement.scrollParent is not a function
[FAIL] scrollParent skips intermediate open shadow tree nodes
  openInnerElement.scrollParent is not a function
[FAIL] scrollParent from inside closed shadow tree
  closedShadowRoot.querySelector(...).scrollParent is not a function
[FAIL] scrollParent from inside open shadow tree
  openShadowComponent.shadowRoot.querySelector(...).scrollParent is not a function
Harness: the test ran to completion.
